classes.description: Known missing knowledge area; tracked but not blocking promotion of unrelated artifacts.
Content derived from OCR below confidence threshold; requires human pass.
Cluster of inferred artifacts in one domain; needs targeted review.
Procedure references a spec that does not exist; blocks promotion of dependents.
Ambiguity escalation that did not resolve; blocks canonicalization.
Open governance principle / authority gap; tracked at doctrine level.
Whole semantic domain blocked pending OEM input; blocks promotion within domain.
Promoted artifact whose dependencies are not yet promoted.

rules: All debt items have: id, class, owner, opened-date, blocking-flag, related-artifact-ids.
Blocking debt prevents promotion of dependent artifacts but never destroys lineage.
Debt items are closed only by an explicit resolution event (resolved / wont-fix / superseded-by).
Wont-fix debt MUST record rationale and reviewer.
